base_url.name: Base URL
base_url.hint: Base URL, compatible to OpenAI format platform

api_key.name: API Key
api_key.hint: Your API Key from your provider

headers.name: Custom Headers
headers.hint: Custom headers passed to OpenAI Client

endpoint.name: Endpoint
endpoint.hint: Endpoint to send image generation requests. Use v1/chat for multimodal chat models that return images via chat completions.

size.name: Image Size
size.hint: Image size (e.g., 1024x1024). Only applies to v1/image endpoint.

slow_request_threshold.name: Slow Request Threshold
slow_request_threshold.hint: Requests slower than this threshold (seconds) will be logged as slow requests
